content.en:
"Fix the formation!"

The Lord of the Qin River commanded.

The Eternal Supreme Dao Realm began to repair the formation, and did not leave here, and it had to prevent the No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss Riot.

However, the chance of the demon seed coming out of the abyss will not be too high.

The Lord of Qinhe is also taking out a variety of precious resources to repair their injuries, even if the probability of the demon seed coming out of the abyss is not high, they have to be careful.

So, they need to recover from their injuries as soon as possible.

......

In front of the Pillar of Eternity.

Ye Tian was still attacking the mark of the demon seed Linyuan, and gradually, the mark was about to shatter.

And the speed of the demon seed in the abyss is very fast, and it is about to come.

"Final blow!"

Rumble!!!!

The mark of the Demon Seed Abyss was completely shattered, and the Demon Seed Abyss completely lost control of the Eternal Demon Pillar.

"You're looking for death!"

The voice of the demon seed abyss came, filled with endless anger.

It can be seen that the wisdom of the demon seed is not low.

It's just that he didn't expect that there would be an Eternal Dao Realm that could get close to the Eternal Demon Pillar and destroy his mark, even the powerhouses of the Eternal Realm God Realm wouldn't dare to do so!

It was also that the Lord of Qinhe didn't understand the terrifyingness of the Eternal Demon Pillar and the difficulty of destroying the mark, otherwise he would definitely doubt Ye Tian's words.

A normal half-step Eternal Realm God Realm, even if he sacrificed himself, it would be impossible to destroy the mark left by the Demon Seed Lin Yuan on the 203 Eternal Demon Pillar, and he would only be transformed by the Demon Seed.

Rumble!!!!!

Under the blow of the demon seed Linyuan, Ye Tian's copy body couldn't bear it directly, and he was killed in an instant.

However, his purpose has been accomplished.

......

"Everyone, the Demon Seed Abyss should not come out, in the future, I will send a clone here, even if the Demon Seed Linyuan wants to rush out, I have time to block him for a while, enough for you to support!"

Ye Tian took the initiative to say.

"That's great!"

The Lord of Qinhe breathed a sigh of relief.

Ye Tian's strength was not weak, it was completely equivalent to a half-step Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouse.

The other half-step Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouses didn't want to stay here all the time.

Therefore, Ye Tian took the initiative to propose it, and several other half-step Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouses were automatically willing and agreed.

However, they still waited for some years, and when they saw that it was almost impossible for the No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss Riot to appear, they left one by one.

And Ye Tian was in charge of guarding the first line of defense in the No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss.

After the Qin River Country Lord and them left, Ye Tian showed an excited look. He took the initiative to guard this place, not because of his sense of responsibility, but for the Eternal Pillar.

He had already seen the preciousness of the Eternal Demon Pillar, and he naturally didn't want to give up the Eternal Demon Pillar.

The strength of the demon seed Lin Yuan is indeed very strong, he is not an opponent, but three copy bodies can drag the other party, if it is five copy bodies, it is enough to trap the other party.

He is going to use five replica bodies to trap the demon seed Linyuan, and then let one copy body refine the Eternal Demon Pillar, as long as he refines a little Eternal Demon Pillar, he can mobilize the power of the Eternal Demon Pillar to counter the Demon Seed Linyuan.

When the time comes, the Eternal Pillar will be his!

It is precisely because of this intention that he will take the initiative to guard this place.

......

this day.

Ye Tian entered the No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss, stayed for a while, copied a copy body, and returned to the first line of defense, the other Eternal Dao Realms naturally had no suspicions, and only thought that Ye Tian had entered the No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss to inspect it.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian copied one body after another, and then went to the Eternal Demon Pillar again.

Soon.

When the demon seed Lin Yuan saw Ye Tian, he showed a puzzled look.

He knew that Ye Tian had a clone, but he was killed by himself, and another one was severely injured, why did there be so many clones!

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian's five replica bodies rushed over and besieged the Demon Seed Abyss.

Before, the Demon Seed Lin Yuan forcibly urged the power of the Eternal Demon Pillar again and again, but he was also a little injured, and he was besieged by Ye Tian's five copy bodies, and he was suppressed for a while.

Of course.

Ye Tian wanted to kill the demon seed Linyuan, but he still couldn't do it, so he could only do his best to trap him.

"Prison of the Sun!"

Ye Tian cast this Eternal Dao Seed Secret Technique, and the five replica bodies all performed this Eternal Dao Seed Secret Technique, and the five ruin sun prisons locked the Demon Seed Linyuan, and did their best to trap him.

And Ye Tian's sixth copy body came to the Eternal Demon Pillar and began to refine the Eternal Demon Pillar.

At this time.

Demon Seed Lin Yuan also saw Ye Tian's plan, and smiled coldly: "The Eternal Dao Realm also wants to refine the Eternal Demon Pillar, and it will be transformed into a demon seed sooner rather than later!"

"Linyuan, it seems that your wisdom is not low, I am curious, is your consciousness the previous Linyuan Dao Master?"

Ye Tian asked.

"After you become a demon, you will know when you reach my level, do you want to try it?"

Lin Yuan sneered.

Ye Tian felt that Linyuan's consciousness was afraid that it was different, it was a nascent consciousness, and it was not the Linyuan Dao Master in the past, but he thought so, and other Eternal Dao realms would not think so.

At the beginning, Demon Seed Lin Yuan didn't panic at all, he didn't think that Ye Tian would be able to refine the Eternal Demon Pillar.

However.

Ten thousand years have passed!

The 100,000 years of the Solstice Era have passed!

The years of the Millions of Solstices have passed!

Unconsciously, 100 million years have passed.

Ye Tian and the Demon Seed Lin Yuan have been fighting for so long, and during this period, Ye Tian's copy body has been changed many times, mainly because his strength has been exhausted.

He is only eternally cultivating to the peak of the Dao realm, and the demon seed abyss is a half-step eternal realm god realm, and his cultivation is beyond Ye Tian, plus this is the demon seed abyss, and his strength recovery speed is also faster than Ye Tian, so he can naturally hold on for a long time.

At this time.

Demon Seed Lin Yuan was already desperate, he couldn't believe why Ye Tian hadn't been transformed by Demon Seed until now!

Moreover, how many doppelgangers there are in Ye Tian are still constantly rotated.

"Why haven't you been seeded yet?"

Demon Seed Lin Yuan asked suspiciously.

Ye Tian said: "I have obtained a treasure that can stabilize the Eternal Dao Seed, and it is very difficult to transform me into a demon seed. "

He was deliberately fooling the Demon Seed Linyuan, and he wouldn't reveal the secret of being a Perfect Eternal Dao Seed.

"Please, let me go, I can be loyal to you!" Demon Seed Lin Yuan began to beg for mercy.

Once Ye Tian really controls the Eternal Demon Pillar, he will definitely die!

So, he's scared!

"No, you can't!"

How dare Ye Tian ask for the allegiance of a demon seed, if it spreads, those powerhouses of the Eternal Realm God Realm will have to kill him.

The demon seed and the eternal Dao powerhouse are natural and mortal enemies, and it is impossible to reconcile.
